method_summary: AlignDiff is a framework that uses RL from Human Feedback (RLHF) to quantify human preferences and guide diffusion planning for zero-shot behavior customization, covering both abstractness and mutability.
key_innovation: AlignDiff framework that leverages RLHF to quantify human preferences and utilizes them to guide diffusion planning for zero-shot behavior customization
title: AlignDiff: Aligning Diverse Human Preferences via Behavior-Customisable Diffusion Model
